title: Typing challenge: reply to Doggo
drDigitalIntro:
You have learned the whole keyboard — now let's put it to work!
• Doggo is hungry and needs a reply.
• Type Dr. Digital's message exactly as shown.
• You will need letters, numbers, spaces, punctuation, and Shift.

playgroundTask.instructions: Type Dr. Digital's reply to Doggo exactly — match every capital letter, number, and punctuation mark.
playgroundTask.targetText: Sure Doggo, I will give you 32 pebbles and 6 bones. Is that okay?

drDigitalSuccess: Doggo is thrilled — and your typing skills are impressive! You used capitals, numbers, commas, and a question mark all in one go.
drDigitalHint: Use Shift for the capital S in 'Sure', and for the question mark at the end. The commas are regular punctuation keys — no Shift needed for those.
